ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drone_telemetry" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telemetry record */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the drone's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the drone's location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the drone in meters */,
  "velocity_x" REAL /* Velocity in the X direction */,
  "velocity_y" REAL /* Velocity in the Y direction */,
  "velocity_z" REAL /* Velocity in the Z direction */,
  "drone_heading" REAL /* Heading of the drone in degrees */,
  "battery" INTEGER /* Battery level percentage */,
  "voltage" INTEGER /* Voltage in millivolts */,
  "current" INTEGER /* Current in milliamperes */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of data collection */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone that generated the telemetry data */,
  "signal_strength" INTEGER /* Wi-Fi signal strength in dBm */,
  "flight_mode" TEXT /* Current flight mode */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during data collection */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to any images captured during the mission */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to any videos captured during the mission */,
  "payload_weight" REAL /* Weight of the payload being carried by the drone */,
  "payload_type" TEXT /* Type of payload */,
  "flight_path_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight path associated with the telemetry data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drone_telemetry_flight_path_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_path_id") REFERENCES missions ("flight_path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drone_telemetry_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drones" (
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drone */,
  "drone_model" TEXT /* Model of the drone */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drone */,
  "max_payload" REAL /* Maximum payload capacity in kilograms */,
  "battery_capacity" INTEGER /* Battery capacity in mAh */,
  "max_flight_time" INTEGER /* Maximum flight time in minutes */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the drone */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the drone */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "drone_status" TEXT /* Current status of the drone */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* Last known GPS coordinates of the drone */,
  "total_flight_hours" INTEGER /* Total flight hours of the drone */,
  "total_distance_flown" REAL /* Total distance flown by the drone in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone used for the mission */,
  "mission_type" TEXT /* Type of mission (e.g., surveillance, agriculture) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the mission */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the mission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mission (e.g., completed, ongoing) */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "mission_description" TEXT /* Description of the mission */,
  "mission_location" TEXT /* Location where the mission is conducted */,
  "mission_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the mission */,
  "mission_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the mission */,
  "mission_team" TEXT /* Names or IDs of team members involved in the mission */,
  "data_collection_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for data collection */,
  "geospatial_api" TEXT /* Third-party geospatial API used for the mission */,
  "flight_path_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight path associated with the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_flight_path_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_path_id") REFERENCES missions ("flight_path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pilot, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission if the action is related to a specific mission */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone if the action is related to a specific drone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone used for the analysis */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission for which the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis result */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis result */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to any images used in the analysis */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to any videos used in the analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drone that received maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., inspection, repair) */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in hours */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_performed_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)
